scope.title: Contract Fulfillment Ledger And Gate
scope.objective: Make every UX/API/proof contract from E00-E11 traceable to source, runtime, API, screenshot/capture or exception proof, and prevent markdown/register drift from being accepted as fulfillment.
scope.executionRule: Execute one ticket at a time, in the listed order. Stop at decision gates before widening CI or changing canonical source ownership.
scope.sourceOnlyScreenshotRule: No screenshot is required for ledger, source-gate, report, package-script or documentation-only changes. Screenshots are required only when visible UI changes are made during later burn-down tickets.

inputsReviewed.role: Primary E00-E09 task architecture and CTES hierarchy.
criticalFindings: Contracts/specifications are enablers, not delivery completion.
Each epic must contain analysis, specification, implementation and QA, not contract-only closure.
Broad UI, state, feedback, data-surface, accessibility and capture work must be split into ordered delivery chains.

inputsReviewed.role: Current hard-retire and migration debt source for action zones, fake/static filters and retired proof UI.
criticalFindings: The registers are useful inventory, but they are still markdown-first and can drift from source gates.
Existing E10 tests duplicate register truth in arrays instead of consuming one canonical ledger.
Temporary exceptions need owner, expiry/follow-up and blocking behavior.

inputsReviewed.role: Canonical backend filtering, sorting, pagination and source-truth surface rules.
criticalFindings: DB-backed, filtered and paginated claims must be backed by API/readmodel metadata.
Static/demo/local snapshot surfaces must not imply backend query behavior.
DataTable server mode and API meta must become contract obligations, not scattered assertions.

inputsReviewed.role: Capture metadata, duplicate/long-screen QA and release-mode warning enforcement.
criticalFindings: Old capture bundles remain historical evidence only.
New release captures must use CAPTURE_QA_FAIL_ON_WARNINGS=1.
Capture proof must be represented as current-run proof status, not a manual screenshot convention.

inputsReviewed.role: Existing source-level contract families that should stay leading for their domain while the new ledger becomes the meta-contract.

canonicalTruth.rule: Markdown registers and reports are review surfaces. The ledger is the machine-readable fulfillment truth. Long-term, E10/E11 markdown tables should be generated from or validated against the ledger.

gate.phaseCheckTarget: phase:check should include pnpm test:contract-fulfillment only after one approved hardening step.
gate.releaseCaptureRule: New release capture proof must run pnpm visual:capture-qa:release, which sets CAPTURE_QA_FAIL_ON_WARNINGS=1.

metaContract.purpose: Declare which typed contracts and markdown/register obligations are active, which owner surfaces must fulfill them, which exceptions are allowed and when they expire.
activeMarkdownRegisters: E11 backend data surface coverage register

fieldDefinitions.id: Stable ID such as E05-ACTION-HIERARCHY, E10-DSF-001 or E11-DS-004.
fieldDefinitions.title: Short human-readable obligation title.
fieldDefinitions.source: Origin artifact: upload task, markdown spec/register, typed contract, source gate or API test.
fieldDefinitions.contractFamily: operating_model | page_template | proof_reviewer | lifecycle_state | action_feedback | data_surface | client_visibility | visual_accessibility | capture_qa | register_debt | backend_query_truth | release_gate
fieldDefinitions.ownerSurface: Files, routes, APIs, scripts or tests that own fulfillment.
fieldDefinitions.obligation: The concrete statement that must be true in source/runtime/API/capture.
fieldDefinitions.proofType: source_gate | runtime_test | api_test | screenshot | capture_qa | typed_contract | generated_report | manual_decision
fieldDefinitions.status: fulfilled | partial | exception | blocked | retired | historical | planned
fieldDefinitions.evidence: List of source files, tests, commands and optional report paths proving the current status.
fieldDefinitions.expiresOrFollowUp: Required for partial, exception and blocked entries. Must be a date, named follow-up ticket or explicit decision gate.
fieldDefinitions.notes: Optional narrow context. Must not carry the only proof.

hardSchemaRules: A status of fulfilled requires at least one proof anchor and one ownerSurface.
A status of exception, partial or blocked requires expiresOrFollowUp.
A status of historical cannot satisfy current release proof.
A source of markdown_register cannot be the only evidence for fulfilled.
A proofType of screenshot cannot satisfy API/filter/pagination truth without API or runtime proof.

initialLedgerSeed.obligation: Contracts/specs are prerequisites and acceptance anchors, not delivery completion.
Every route resolves to one canonical operating mode, audience and proof posture.
Page/template hierarchy, route family and proof placement are resolved through shared page contracts rather than local route folklore.
Operational default UI must stay separated from reviewer/capture proof surfaces, with client-mode suppression.
Modal, drawer, base state and capture variants use canonical lifecycle/state metadata.
Action hierarchy, availability, disabled reasons and feedback messages project from canonical contracts.
Shared table/filter/master-detail surfaces expose accurate density, filter-state and source-truth claims.
Client-facing UI must suppress internal rationale, debug/proof metadata, compliance notes and unreleased payloads.
Focus, selected, semantic status and density states are shared primitive behavior, not local taste.
Current release capture proof must pass E09 QA with warnings treated as failures.
Local action-class vocabularies are registered migration debt and cannot grow outside the ledger.
Disabled/static filter controls require canonical metadata or explicit temporary exception IDs.
Retired ProductGuidance proof/debug UI must not re-enter active operational surfaces.
Every backend_query_backed UI surface must have API meta, sourceTruth and UI consumption proof for filtering, sorting and pagination claims.

gateRules.rule: All ledger IDs and migrated register IDs must be unique.
Every exception, partial and blocked ledger entry must include expiresOrFollowUp.
No new primaryButtonClass, secondaryButtonClass, staticButtonClass or destructiveButtonClass definitions outside ledger-registered owner surfaces.
No new route-local disabled/static filter/search controls without canonical data-surface metadata and ledger/register ID.
Every backend_query_backed surface must have API/readmodel metadata: sourceTruth, page, pageSize, returnedRows, totalRows, totalPages, hasNextPage, hasPreviousPage, sortKey, sortDirection and query.
Visible DB-backed, filtered, sorted or paginated claims require matching UI source-truth consumption proof.
Retired ProductGuidance proof/debug implementation imports and visible resurrection are blocked outside historical docs.
New release capture proof must run with CAPTURE_QA_FAIL_ON_WARNINGS=1. Historical capture bundles are archival and cannot satisfy current release proof.
Markdown-only evidence cannot mark a contract fulfilled.
Retired UI patterns remain retired unless a new explicit user decision reverses them.

ticketSequence.title: Inventory all E00-E11 contracts and proof anchors
workItems: Parse E00-E09 from the upload into contract obligations and implementation outputs.
Inventory E10 registers and E11 coverage rows as debt/fulfillment obligations.
Inventory typed contracts, source gates, API tests, capture scripts and package commands.
Classify each item as fulfilled, partial, exception, blocked, retired, historical or planned.
Identify duplicate truth surfaces and choose the canonical owner.
acceptanceCriteria: Every E00-E11 contract family has an inventory row.
Markdown-only entries are not marked fulfilled.
Every exception has a candidate follow-up or decision gate.
The inventory names the typed contract or source/test gap for each obligation.
validation: manual review against upload headings and current docs/ux/lib/tests/scripts files
ticketSequence.finishMessage: Finished E12-A1 after inventory and gap classification are committed or reported.

ticketSequence.title: Define ledger schema, status model and hard rules
workItems: Write the formal E12 fulfillment spec.
Define ledger states, proof types, gate behavior and exception expiry rules.
Define markdown/register generation or validation policy.
Define exact failure semantics for new debt versus existing registered debt.
Define the release validation bundle beyond phase:check.
acceptanceCriteria: The spec states that markdown/register prose is not proof by itself.
The spec makes DB-backed/filter/pagination claims fail without API metadata.
The spec states that CAPTURE_QA_FAIL_ON_WARNINGS=1 is mandatory for new release captures.

The spec names the commands required for release definition: pnpm guard:source, pnpm test:route-smoke, pnpm test:contract-fulfillment, pnpm visual:capture-qa:release when new release captures are produced, plus focused API/UI tests for touched contracts.

decisionGate.question: Should existing registered exceptions fail immediately or warn first?
decisionGate.recommendation: Warn for existing registered exceptions, fail new unregistered debt immediately, then flip remaining exceptions to hard failure after one burn-down pass.

ticketSequence.finishMessage: Finished E12-S1 after the status model and gate rules are specified.

ticketSequence.title: Introduce canonical typed contract ledger
workItems: Create lib/ux-contract-ledger.ts with schema types, statuses, proof types and gate behavior.
Seed E00-E11 entries, including E10 register debt and E11 backend data-surface obligations.
Add helper queries for duplicate IDs, missing evidence, expired exceptions, retired pattern enforcement and incomplete backend truth.
Optionally add docs/ux/contract-ledger.json as generated snapshot only if useful for non-TypeScript tooling.
Add focused ledger tests.
acceptanceCriteria: Ledger compiles under TypeScript.
Every ledger entry has id, source, ownerSurface, obligation, proofType, status, evidence, gateBehavior and expiresOrFollowUp where required.
Duplicate IDs fail tests.
Fulfilled entries without proof anchors fail tests.
Partial/exception/blocked entries without follow-up fail tests.
ticketSequence.finishMessage: Finished E12-I1 after the typed ledger and ledger unit tests are green.

ticketSequence.title: Make E10/E11 markdown registers ledger-backed
workItems: Convert E10 AZ, DSF and RPU rows into ledger entries with stable IDs such as E10-AZ-001, E10-DSF-001 and E10-RPU-001.
Convert E11 coverage rows into ledger entries with IDs such as E11-DS-001 through E11-DS-008.
Update E10/E11 tests to consume ledger exports where practical instead of local duplicate arrays.
Mark markdown registers as ledger-validated now, with a later option to generate them from the ledger.
Keep historical docs untouched and explicitly non-authoritative for current fulfillment.
acceptanceCriteria: E10/E11 source gates and ledger use the same IDs.
Every exception has a follow-up.
No active retired proof UI import can pass.
Backend query-backed surfaces cannot pass without API meta and UI source-truth obligations.

decisionGate.question: Should E10/E11 markdown registers become generated/read-only from the ledger?
decisionGate.recommendation: Yes. Make the ledger canonical and markdown generated/read-only to remove the drift class permanently.

ticketSequence.finishMessage: Finished E12-I2 after register IDs and tests are ledger-aligned.

ticketSequence.title: Build global contract fulfillment gate
workItems: Create scripts/contract-fulfillment-gate.ts.
Read ledger entries and evaluate all gateRules.
Emit JSON and markdown reports with counts by status, family, proof type and severity.
Fail for duplicate IDs, missing follow-ups, markdown-only fulfilled entries, retired UI resurrection, new unregistered local action/filter debt and backend-query claims without metadata.
Support environment flags for staged hardening, including fail-on-existing-exceptions after burn-down.
Add fixture-based positive and negative tests.
acceptanceCriteria: The gate exits zero only when all failure rules pass.
The gate distinguishes warnings from failures.
The JSON report is stable and machine-readable.
The markdown report is concise enough for release review.
Negative tests prove failures are not cosmetic.
ticketSequence.finishMessage: Finished E12-I3 after the global gate and report tests are green.

ticketSequence.title: Wire package scripts and release definition
workItems: Add package.json script test:contract-fulfillment.
Add a release command bundle to the E12 report/spec.
Do not add the gate to phase:check until explicitly approved after Q1 unless the user approves immediate hard CI.
Document focused follow-up command selection for touched contracts.
acceptanceCriteria: pnpm test:contract-fulfillment runs the gate deterministically.
phase:check remains unchanged unless approved.
Release definition names guard:source, route smoke, contract fulfillment, capture QA release and focused touched-contract tests.

decisionGate.question: Should test:contract-fulfillment be added to phase:check now?
decisionGate.recommendation: Not before Q1 unless the current report is clean. Add the focused script first, then hard-wire phase:check after the first clean or explicitly accepted exception report.

ticketSequence.finishMessage: Finished E12-I4 after package scripts and release command boundaries are in place.

ticketSequence.title: Enforce capture QA as fulfillment proof
workItems: Represent historical capture bundles as historical evidence only in the ledger/report.
Represent current release-capture status as no_capture_needed, archival_only, current_warning, current_pass or current_fail.
Make the fulfillment report point to pnpm visual:capture-qa:release for new release captures.
Ensure capture warnings cannot satisfy release proof when CAPTURE_QA_FAIL_ON_WARNINGS=1 is required.
acceptanceCriteria: Old capture bundles cannot be primary release proof.
The report states when no screenshot/capture was warranted.
New release captures require CAPTURE_QA_FAIL_ON_WARNINGS=1.
ticketSequence.finishMessage: Finished E12-I5 after capture proof semantics are ledger/gate-backed.

ticketSequence.title: Run full E12 validation and produce fulfillment proof report
workItems: Run source guard.
Run typecheck.
Run ledger and gate tests.
Run E10, E11 and E09 focused tests.
Run route smoke if any UI routing/shell behavior changed.
Run visual:capture-qa:release only when new release captures are produced or existing current release proof is being certified.
Produce a proof report with fulfilled, partial, blocked, exception and retired counts.
acceptanceCriteria: The validation report lists every command and result.
The report names remaining exceptions and recommended burn-down tickets.
No contract is marked fulfilled from markdown alone.
No UI screenshot is claimed unless visible UI actually changed.
validation: playwright test tests/ux-contract-ledger.spec.ts tests/contract-fulfillment-gate.spec.ts tests/e10-register-reconciliation.spec.ts tests/e11-backend-data-surface-truth.spec.ts tests/e09-capture-release-policy.spec.ts
ticketSequence.finishMessage: Finished E12-Q1 after the validation report is written and remaining gaps are explicit.

minimumCommands: pnpm visual:capture-qa:release when new release captures are produced
releaseDefinitionTarget.phaseCheckRecommendation: After Q1, add pnpm test:contract-fulfillment to phase:check only if the current report is clean or every remaining exception is explicitly approved with expiry.

decisionGates.boldRecommendation: Fail all new debt immediately, warn existing registered exceptions for one burn-down pass, then flip all unexpired exceptions to hard failure.
Make E10/E11 markdown registers generated/read-only from the ledger. Hand-edited markdown should fail validation.
Do not keep this as a soft audit. Once Q1 has a clean or explicitly excepted report, add pnpm test:contract-fulfillment to phase:check.

risksAndMitigations.risk: The ledger becomes another duplicate truth layer.
risksAndMitigations.mitigation: Make it the meta-contract only: typed domain contracts remain domain truth, the ledger records obligations, ownership and proof status.

risksAndMitigations.risk: Markdown registers drift after ledger introduction.
risksAndMitigations.mitigation: Move to generated/read-only markdown after E12-I2 approval.

risksAndMitigations.risk: Existing exceptions block momentum if hard-failed immediately.
risksAndMitigations.mitigation: Fail new debt now, warn existing registered debt for one pass, require follow-up/expiry on every exception.

risksAndMitigations.risk: Backend data-surface claims are over-validated by source string checks only.
risksAndMitigations.mitigation: Require API metadata tests and UI source-truth consumption, especially for backend_query_backed surfaces.

risksAndMitigations.risk: Capture proof is confused with historical screenshots.
risksAndMitigations.mitigation: Archive old bundles as historical only and require E09-compliant current runs for release proof.

commitRecommendation: Commit this plan alone as a planning artifact. Implementation should be committed ticket-by-ticket after each E12 step passes its focused validation.
